---
title: "Beyond reliability in first impressions research: Considering validity and the need to \"mix it up with folks\""
authors: "Satchell, L. P., Jaeger, B., Jones, A. L., López, B., & Schild, C."
year: 2023
date: 2023-01-01
pub-journal: "Social Psychological Bulletin"
volume: "18"
pages: "e10211"
doi: "10.32872/spb.10211"
pdf: "assets/papers/2023/satchelletal2023.pdf"
categories: [first-impressions, methodology]
---
